findings.title: KiCad design file appears malformed or unreadable
findings.message: PCB file is malformed or unreadable: PCB file is suspiciously small or missing kicad_pcb root.
findings.remediation: Open and save the project in KiCad or restore the valid file.

findings.title: KiCad design file appears malformed or unreadable
findings.message: Project file is malformed or unreadable: file is suspiciously small.
findings.remediation: Open and save the project in KiCad or restore the valid file.

findings.title: KiCad design file appears malformed or unreadable
findings.message: Schematic file is malformed or unreadable: schematic file is suspiciously small or missing kicad_sch root.
findings.remediation: Open and save the project in KiCad or restore the valid file.

findings.title: kicad-cli is unavailable
findings.message: kicad-cli was not found, so KiCad-backed ERC and DRC checks were skipped.
findings.remediation: Install KiCad CLI or configure kicad-cli-path.

findings.title: manufacturing release metadata is missing
findings.message: No boardguard.yml manufacturing release metadata was found.
findings.remediation: Add boardguard.yml with board name, revision, output profile, and release artifact policy.
